title: Big Looter
description: Looting 3+ snatches armor and tool/weapon from mobs.
body:
This mod enhances [Minecraft's Looting enchantment]([https://minecraft.wiki/w/Looting](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Looting)). In addition to the usual perks of Looting, any weapon with **Looting III** _or higher_ will get all the armor the mob is wearing and whatever weapon/tool is in the mob's main hand on the mob's death. Every time. No hoping for long odds in your favor.

Is that Drowned hurling tridents at you? You'll get it when you kill it.\
Think Piglins don't deserve all that gold armor? Well, you'll deserve it once your Looting III sword finishes them off!\
Envious of that chainmail armor a skeleton has? Make it yours.


![Made with MCreator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4fa6ec3cef0ff314cdbf8800718e2c906d8a6da.png)
